title: Model 100 Hacker Layout for Keychron (Simlayer Edition)

rules.description: Caps Lock recovery: Left/Right Shift + Caps Lock = real Caps Lock toggle
Caps Lock dual-role: tap Esc, hold Cmd
Combos: H+J=Tab, J+K=Space, D+F=Backspace, K+L=Enter, F+G=Esc
Simlayer: W = Cmd+Option (D/F/J/K → Cmd+Opt+Arrows for tab switching)
